3224530.name: Late Night Cleaning Simulator Demo
3224530.description:
Late Night Cleaning Simulator is an exciting top down 2d cleaning game! The game has two levels from the General Cleaning Mode.

General Cleaning Mode: Test your cleaning skills and aim for the highest score as you clean eight different businesses. Compete against yourself or compare your score to your friends to see who can achieve the best cleaning performance. Keep an eye on every detail to maximize your score and earn bragging rights as the ultimate cleaner.

The full game has two more game modes, one called The Village which is an open world level and another game mode called the Lab see how many nights you can go with out being fired.
